item.title: SingGuard-NSFA：通过生成推理和实时分类实现代理 AI 的可扩展护栏
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13081v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present nsfaguard, a guardrail framework for securing agentic AI systems against operational threats, such as prompt injection, sensitive information extraction, malicious code requests, dangerous tool misuse, and resource exhaustion.
